data.text: THIS MOON IN EKA30 IS SO NAMED BECAUSE OF IT'S IMMENSE
NEON, GLOWING BRIGHTNESS. ONE OF THE MORE BEAUTIFUL MOONS
I'VE YET SEEN. THIS CRATERIZED PLANET IS WORTH A VISIT TO
AFTER VISITING THIS PLANET, I AT FIRST THOUGHT THAT IT WAS
SMOOTH AND UNINTERESTING, BUT A LITTLE WAYS WEST OF 279.77
AN IMMENSE CRATER/MOUNTAIN CAN BE SEEN. THE VERY LOW GRAVITY
OF THE MOON ALLOWS FOR AN EXHILIRATING JUMP OFF OF THE TOP
